evidence.evidence_excerpt: ### On-chain governance Livepeer’s governance is fully on-chain and stakeholder-driven. - Any LPT holder can propose protocol changes or treasury spending by staking 100 LPT. - All staked LPT holders (including Delegators via their Orchestrators) can vote on proposals. - Votes last for 30 rounds (~30 days). - For a proposal to pass, at least 33% of all staked tokens must participate (quorum), and…
